case_title: MARWAN DEISIEH VS. DEMOIN L. SHAW et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-13-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MANUEL, RAFAEL T
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF DEISIEH, MARWAN

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,109.90 FILED BY DEISIEH, MARWAN AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, DEMOIN L. JONES, SHONTA FABIANI, DANIELLE KRISTINE MANUEL, RAFAEL T ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS DANIELLE FABIANI,(SERVICE WAIVED), RAFAEL T. MANUEL AND SHONTA JONES PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEMOIN SHAW NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-22-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, SHONTA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAY-19-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, DEMOIN L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEISIEH, MARWAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, DEMOIN L. JONES, SHONTA FABIANI, DANIELLE KRISTINE MANUEL, RAFAEL T $2,029.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,169.00, THE COURT APPORTIONS DAMAGES AS FOLLOWS: 50% TO DEFENDANTS TORRES AND FABIANI, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY; AND 50% TO DEFENDANTS JONES AND SHAW, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
